calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff KV Lee Properties, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness Kim Lee was sworn and direct examined.
Defaults were entered against defendants on Feb. 1, 2010
Doe defendants were dismissed on Oct. 6, 2010

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Leland Ackland ind. & dba interior Resources and Eun Soon Ackland ind. & dba Interior Resources as follows:

Past due rent and damages $123,596.48
Attorney fees $2,800.00
Costs $550.00, for a Total of $126,946.348
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
